actions.intent: Acknowledge the tempting upper route without finishing it first.
Commit to the lower water-priority lane.
Break the lower-side ice support and keep pressure on the endangered puppy.
Open the lower puppy's right side.
Open the lower route from the flood edge.
Extract the lower puppy before returning to the lure.

notes: Designer golden for the safe-puppy trap: resist the easy upper rescue, secure the endangered lower puppy first.
